name: Defender of the Ice Barrier
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>護</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>陣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: While you control another "Ice Barrier" monster, monsters your opponent controls cannot declare an attack if their ATK is greater than or equal to this card's DEF.

eff: While you control another "Ice Barrier" monster, monsters your opponent controls cannot declare an attack if their ATK is greater than or equal to this card's DEF.

attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
